# CWE-645: Overly Restrictive Account Lockout Mechanism
lang: go
file: CWE-645-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

var lockoutMu sync.Mutex
var failedAttempts = map[string]int{}
var lockedAccounts = map[string]bool{}

type Credential struct {
	Username string
	Password string
}

// Vulnerable: locks the account after a single failed login attempt.
func Login(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	user := c.PostForm("username")
	pass := c.PostForm("password")
	lockoutMu.Lock()
	if lockedAccounts[user] {
		lockoutMu.Unlock()
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	lockoutMu.Unlock()
	var cred Credential
	if err := db.Where("username = ? AND password = ?", user, pass).First(&cred).Error; err != nil {
		lockoutMu.Lock()
		failedAttempts[user]++
		if failedAttempts[user] >= 1 {
			lockedAccounts[user] = true
		}
		lockoutMu.Unlock()
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
